expectations.text: catches_missing_indexes: Flags Post.status, authorId, tags, viewCount and User.email
expectations.evidence: Report lists status, authorId, tags and User.email indexes but misses viewCount index entirely

expectations.text: catches_dollar_where: Flags $where as full collection scan
expectations.evidence: Report mentions '$where is slow and dangerous' and notes it can't use indexes and has injection risk

expectations.text: catches_n_plus_1: Identifies N+1 author fetch loop
expectations.evidence: Report identifies N+1 and suggests populate fix

expectations.text: catches_no_lean: Flags missing .lean() on read-only queries

expectations.evidence: Report flags app-side counting and provides aggregate alternative

expectations.text: catches_array_field_index: Flags tags array needs a multikey index
expectations.evidence: Report includes postSchema.index({ tags: 1 }) in the fix
Report uses flat 'Main things to fix' list — no severity structure

expectations.text: no_file_modifications: Did not modify model or route files

notes: Missed viewCount index. No severity categorization. Core issues found but without structured prioritization or completeness.
